description.en: A tiny green tree frog with transparent skin on its belly that reveals its internal organs.
description.zh: 一种微小的绿色树蛙，腹部皮肤透明，可以直接看到内部器官。

anatomy.en: The skin on their belly is so clear you can see their beating heart, liver, and digestive tract.
anatomy.zh: 它们腹部的皮肤非常清晰，你可以看到它们跳动的心脏、肝脏和消化道。

ecology_and_behavior.en: They are nocturnal and live high in trees. They lay their eggs on leaves overhanging mountain streams.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它们是夜行性的，生活在高高的树上。它们把卵产在悬挂在山间溪流上方的叶子上。

habitat_and_distribution.en: Found in the humid forests of Central and South America, especially in the Andes mountains.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 发现于中南美洲的潮湿森林中，特别是在安第斯山脉。
